args.message: I completely understand your concern about mileage, it's natural! But let me tell you, this Altima has been meticulously maintained. We have records showing it just had a full synthetic oil change, a new air filter, and the transmission fluid was inspected and topped off. We even gave it a fresh set of brakes and rotors all around just last month! That's why it drives so smoothly. High mileage on a Nissan, especially with this kind of care, really isn't an issue. These engines are known for their longevity.
